cloudfront.distribution.CfnAbout: A distribution tells CloudFront where you want content to be delivered from, and the details about how to track and manage content delivery.

cloudfront.distribution.DistributionConf.Description: The current configuration information for the distribution. Send a `GET` request to the `/CloudFront API version/distribution ID/config` resource.

cloudfront.distribution.Tags.Description: A complex type that contains zero or more `Tag` elements.
